heading: Today
text: Numerous clouds from Rt. 2 north. Isolated morning showers, scattered in the afternoon.  Variable clouds and sun through NY and south of Rt. 2, with a few localized afternoon showers, mainly dry in southern valleys.  Much cooler.  Highs 60 to 70 north to south, except 50s over the higher terrain north.  Winds increasing from the northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A few localized showers ending, except lingering from the northern Green Mountains east to the White Mountains.  Variable clouds.  Lows in the 40s to near 50.  Winds northwest 10 to 15 mph, diminishing to less than 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Early clouds, especially east of the Green Mountains, giving way to sun.  Then clouds spreading south, with showers developing through Quebec, working south to the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 later in the day.  Highs in the 60s, some upper 50s far north.  Winds light northwest winds, becoming south to southwest near 10 mph.
